info.name: AI-Powered Supply Chain Platform - Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the AI-Powered Supply Chain & Procurement Platform backend. Endpoints are grouped by module and ordered to walk a realistic onboarding workflow:

1. Auth (Public): register a factory + login
2. Auth (Private): manage users
3. Inventory: warehouses + items
4. Suppliers + Quotations
5. Purchase Orders (full state machine)
6. AI forecasts
7. Reports + Notifications + Billing

The Login request auto-saves accessToken/refreshToken/tenantId/userId to the environment so subsequent calls work without manual copy-paste. POST writes use a freshly-generated Idempotency-Key per request via a pre-request script.

exec: // Generate a fresh Idempotency-Key for any POST request that needs one.

item.name: 01 - Auth (Public)
item.description: No JWT required. Run Register or Login first; the test script saves tokens to the environment.

item.name: Get Quotation (saves quoteToken for first invitation)

exec: // The view does not expose responseToken (PII). For testing the public
// endpoint, query Mongo directly or add a dev-only logging hook.
// Set quoteToken manually in the env for now.
console.log('Tip: copy responseToken from the database into the env var quoteToken.');

item.name: Create Checkout Session (501 NotImplemented for now)
Change Subscription Tier (schedule at period end)
15 - Webhooks (Public, no JWT)
item.description: These accept and audit-log the request. Real signature verification + event dispatch will land when the gateway adapters are wired.

request.description: Webhook router is mounted at /api/webhooks (NOT /api/v1/webhooks). Adjust the URL when running.
Webhook router is mounted at /api/webhooks (NOT /api/v1/webhooks). Adjust the URL when running.
